text:
FILE(S): 
APR Taxonomy 
SOURCE: 
T-MSIS annual provider TAF 
VALUES: 
Alphanumeric character string (e.g., 70, 103TM1800X, 012), or Null/missing; type of value depends on 
the PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS 
COMMENT: 
The values in this field depend on the Provider Classification System/Nomenclature used: 
If PRVDR_CLSFCTN_SYS equals ”1” (taxonomy code) or “N” (primary taxonomy code derived from 
NPPES); then this value is described at the following website: 
https://x12.org/codes/provider-taxonomy-codes
